title.zh: 《AI Scientist：迈向完全自动化、开放式科学发现》
title.en: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery

notes.zh: Sakana AI 等团队描述 AI Scientist 原型、实验流程、评测与限制的原始论文。
notes.en: The original paper from Sakana AI and collaborators describing the AI Scientist prototype, workflow, evaluation, and limitations.

title.zh: Sakana AI 的 AI Scientist 项目页面

notes.zh: Sakana AI 对系统目标、自动研究循环和示例输出的官方说明。
notes.en: Sakana AI's official description of the system goals, automated research loop, and example outputs.

title.zh: 《加速新材料合成的自主实验室》
title.en: An Autonomous Laboratory for the Accelerated Synthesis of Novel Materials

notes.zh: Nature 论文，描述 A-Lab 如何结合计算、机器学习、机器人与主动学习执行材料合成。
notes.en: The Nature paper describing A-Lab's integration of computation, machine learning, robotics, and active learning for materials synthesis.
